value: A handheld accessory from Sigurd,\ncrafted with advanced techniques. It is\na spot-on replica of a divine weapon.
A handheld accessory from Sigurd,\nmodeled after a divine weapon. It\nrepresents his bond with Eldigan.
A vibrantly dyed ribbon from Lachesis.\nIf one is looking for elegance, they\nshould look no further.
A white silk ribbon from Lachesis.\nIf one is looking for a holy aura, they\nshould look no further.
A tasty-looking carrot from Naoise.\nIt seems to be one of this horse's\nfavorite varieties of snack.
Tasty-looking carrots from Naoise.\nSweet and juicy, these are perfect\nfor cooking.
A hat received from Claud, prepared\nfor a priest of Edda. It is designed for\nthose pure of spirit.

key: MDAID_高潔な司祭の帽子・極
MDAID_H_高潔な司祭の帽子・極
value: A hat received from Claud, prepared\nfor a priest of Edda. It is designed to\nhave a sublime presence.

MDAID_H_旅先の少公爵の頭飾り
value: Proof that two Heroes bested a boss\non their journeys together. Serves as\na souvenir from their travels.
Finish all turns to complete a game of Pawns\nof Loki.
Clear the Grand Hero Battle against Xane:\nFickle Dragon with Anna: Commander on\nyour team.
Clear the Grand Hero Battle against Xane:\nFickle Dragon on Lunatic or higher difficulty\nwith Xane: Fickle Dragon on your team.
Defeat Xane: Fickle Dragon at level 40 or\nhigher with Anna: Commander.
Defeat Xane: Fickle Dragon at level 40 or\nhigher with Xane: Fickle Dragon.
Clear the Grand Hero Battle against Xane:\nFickle Dragon on Lunatic or higher difficulty\nusing only flying allies.
Win an Arena Duel at any difficulty.
Win an Arena Duel at any difficulty.
Defeat a sword foe with a lance ally.
Defeat a lance foe with a lance ally.
Defeat an axe foe with a lance ally.
Defeat a colorless bow foe with a lance ally.
Defeat a colorless dagger foe with a lance ally.
Defeat a staff foe with a lance ally.
Defeat a sword foe that is level 30 or higher\nwith a lance ally.
Defeat a lance foe that is level 30 or higher\nwith a lance ally.
Defeat an axe foe that is level 30 or higher\nwith a lance ally.
Defeat a colorless bow foe that is level 30\nor higher with a lance ally.
Defeat a colorless dagger foe that is level 30\nor higher with a lance ally.
Defeat a staff foe that is level 30 or higher\nwith a lance ally.

Clear Book X, Chapter 6: Part 1 on Lunatic
difficulty with a lance ally on your team. (Allies
deployed as cohorts using Pair Up do not
count.) All four allies must survive.

Clear Book X, Chapter 6: Part 2 on Lunatic
difficulty with an axe ally on your team. (Allies
deployed as cohorts using Pair Up do not
count.) All four allies must survive.

Clear Book X, Chapter 6: Part 3 on Lunatic
difficulty with a sword ally on your team. (Allies
deployed as cohorts using Pair Up do not
count.) All four allies must survive.

Clear Book X, Chapter 6: Part 4 on Lunatic
difficulty with a lance ally on your team. (Allies
deployed as cohorts using Pair Up do not
count.) All four allies must survive.

Clear Book X, Chapter 6: Part 5 on Lunatic
difficulty with an axe ally on your team. (Allies
deployed as cohorts using Pair Up do not
count.) All four allies must survive.

The young king of Nordion and the young lord
of Chalphy who fought together, cultivating trust
and friendship that transcend the boundaries of
power. They appear in Fire Emblem: Genealogy
of the Holy War.

Younger sister of Eldigan, ruler of Nordion. Her
close relationship with Eldigan makes others
around them envious of their love. Appears in
Fire Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War.

The head of House Edda, a lineage of clergy
spanning generations. He is a descendant of
Bragi, one of the 12 crusaders. Appears in Fire
Emblem: Genealogy of the Holy War.

A knight of Chalphy in service to Lord Sigurd.
He supports his lord alongside his peers, Alec
and Arden. Appears in Fire Emblem: Genealogy
of the Holy War.

A strong warrior and leader of a band of skilled
assassins. She herself is a master of the sword,
and is feared as a murderer who will kill anyone
for the right price. Appears in Fire Emblem:
Genealogy of the Holy War.
Alan Smithee (阿藍澄史) / INTELLIGENT SYSTEMS

(Duo Skills can be used once per map by
tapping the Duo button. Duo Skills cannot
be used by units deployed using Pair Up.)
(When unit has a status or a skill that enables
use of a Style, Duo Skills and Harmonized Skills
cannot be used while unit can take an action
(those skills can be used after unit has acted).)

Standard Effect 1: Duel
If unit is 5★ and level 40 and unit's stats total
less than 220, treats unit's stats as 220 in
modes like Arena. (Higher-scoring opponents
will appear. Stat total calculation excludes any
values added by merges and skills.)
With the sacred sword, they can't be\ndefeated! They cut right to foes with a\nSpecial, and increase allies' mobility!
Her Attuned skill has Potent Follow!\nHer army gets 7 HP after causing pain.\nHer Style ruins green foes too!
Brings the judgment of god on foes,\nand his Miracle saves his allies! Allies\ncan more easily use their Specials.
His weapon skill weakens groups of\nfoes by inflicting Spd Shackle and Def\nShackle! He can move after combat.

$aEnables【Canto (Dist. +1; Max ４)】.
Accelerates Special trigger (cooldown count-1).

At start of turn, grants Special cooldown
count-1 to unit and allies within 2 spaces
of unit.

At start of player phase or enemy phase, grants
【Truly Incited】and "unit makes a guaranteed
follow-up attack during combat" to unit and
allies within 2 spaces of unit for 1 turn.

Grants Atk/Spd/Def/Res+15 to unit, unit deals
+25 damage (including area-of-effect Specials),
reduces damage from foe's attacks by 15
(excluding area-of-effect Specials), and
reduces damage from foe's Specials by an
additional 15 during combat (excluding
area-of-effect Specials). If unit's HP > 1 and
foe would reduce unit's HP to 0 during combat,
unit survives with 1 HP (once per combat;
does not stack with non-Special effects that
allow unit to survive with 1 HP if foe's attack
would reduce HP to 0).

Restores 7 HP to unit after combat.

【Canto (Dist. +1; Max ４)】
After an attack, Assist skill, or structure
destruction, unit can move spaces = number
of spaces from start position to end position
of unit before the above, +1. (Max ４.)

【Truly Incited】
Grants bonus to Atk/Spd/Def/Res during
combat = number of spaces from start
position to end position of whoever
initiated combat × 2 (max 8).

$aEnables【Canto (Dist. +1; Max ４)】.
Accelerates Special trigger (cooldown count-1).

For unit and allies within 3 rows or 3 columns
centered on unit, grants Atk/Spd/Def/Res+X
(for unit, X = 15; for allies, X = 5), grants bonus
to Atk/Spd/Def/Res = highest bonus on each
stat between target and foes within 2 spaces
of target (calculates each stat bonus
independently), calculates damage using the
lower of foe's Def or Res (excluding
area-of-effect Specials), and restores 7 HP to
unit or ally when unit or ally deals damage to
foe during combat.

Unit deals +25 damage (excluding area-of-effect
Specials), reduces damage from foe's attacks
by 15 (excluding area-of-effect Specials), and
reduces damage from foe's Specials by an
additional 15 during combat (excluding
area-of-effect Specials).

Unit can use the following【Style】:
―――― Weapon Triangle: Red Style ――――
When determining weapon triangle, counts
unit as red (does not affect skill effects
that trigger based on attribute, such as "if
in combat against a red foe"). This Style can
be used only once per turn.

of unit before the above, +1. (Max ４.)

【Style】
Change Style using the Style button at the
bottom of the screen.

A unit's Style is only active when that unit
is taking an action. Style use is disabled when
unit is deployed using Pair Up or when unit is
equipped with multiple skills that have a Style.

other such effect triggers on an ally granted
this effect, this effect will trigger too).

【Spd Shackle】
Inflicts penalty on unit's Spd during combat =
number of Penalty effects active on unit + 4,
excluding stat penalties (max 8).

【Def Shackle】
Inflicts penalty on unit's Def during combat =
number of Penalty effects active on unit + 4,
excluding stat penalties (max 8).

$aIf unit's Special is ready, before combat this
unit initiates, foes in an area near target take
damage equal to 1.5 × (unit's Atk minus foe's
Def or Res).

At the start of turn, grants【Gallop】to unit.

Reduces damage from foe's attacks by 40%
during combat (excluding area-of-effect
Specials).

If unit's Special triggered before this combat
or is ready at start of combat, decreases Spd
difference necessary for unit to make a
follow-up attack by X and increases Spd
difference necessary for foe to make a
follow-up attack by X (if unit's Def > foe's Def,
X = 10 + difference between Def stats × 2;
otherwise, X = 10), and unit's first follow-up
attack deals damage = 80% of unit's Def during
combat.

After combat, if unit's Special triggered, grants
"unit can move 1 extra space" to allies on the
map (excluding unit; that turn only; does not
stack), neutralizes【Stall】, and inflicts【Frozen】
on foes within range of unit's Special that
triggered through their next actions.

【Gallop】
Unit can move 2 extra spaces (that turn only;
only highest value applied; does not stack).

【Stall】
If unit has "unit can move 1 extra space,"
converts that effect into "restricts movement
to 1 space."

【Frozen】
Increases Spd difference necessary for unit to
make a follow-up attack by X and decreases
Spd difference necessary for foe to make a
follow-up attack by X during combat (if foe's
Def > unit's Def, X = 10 + difference between
Def stats × 2; otherwise, X = 10).

$aIf unit's Special is ready, before combat this

After combat, if unit's Special triggered, grants

$aIf an Assist skill is used, unit's Special cooldown
count does not go down.

When Special triggers, boosts damage by 70%
of the greater of unit's or foe's Atk (calculates
damage from staff after combat damage is
added).

Reduces damage from foe's first attack by
40% during combat ("first attack" normally
means only the first strike; for effects that
grant "unit attacks twice," it means the first
and second strikes).

At start of player phase or enemy phase,
grants【Atk Liberate】and【Res Liberate】to
unit and allies within 2 spaces of unit for 1 turn.

【Atk Liberate】
Grants bonus to Atk during combat = number
of【Bonus】effects active on unit, excluding
stat bonuses, + 4 (max 8).

【Res Liberate】
Grants bonus to Res during combat = number
of【Bonus】effects active on unit, excluding
stat bonuses, + 4 (max 8).

【Bonus】
All effects that last "for 1 turn" or "that turn
only." Includes bonuses granted by a skill
like Rally or Hone and positive status effects
(extra movement or effects like Dominance).

Inflicts Atk/Spd/Def/Res-5 on foe, deals
damage = 20% of unit's Spd (excluding
area-of-effect Specials), reduces damage from
foe's attacks by 20% of unit's Spd (excluding
area-of-effect Specials), neutralizes effects
that guarantee foe's follow-up attacks and
effects that prevent unit's follow-up attacks,
and grants Special cooldown count-X to unit

【Exposure】
Foe's attacks deal +10 damage.

【Discord】
Inflicts Atk/Spd/Def/Res-X on unit during
combat (X = 2 + number of allies within
2 spaces of unit; max 5).

【Drain Cancel】
Grants Atk/Spd/Def/Res+4 to unit during
combat.

When a foe triggers both "grants the【Bonus】
effects active on foe" and "neutralizes any
【Bonus】active on foe" effects from skills
such as Essence Drain on unit with this status
active, prevents those effects on unit and
other targets and neutralizes any【Bonus】effects
active on that foe (does not neutralize【Bonus】
effects applied at the same time).

【Bonus】
All effects that last "for 1 turn" or "that turn
only." Includes bonuses granted by a skill
like Rally or Hone and positive status effects
(extra movement or effects like Dominance).

$aReduces damage from foe's first attack by 5
during combat ("first attack" normally means
only the first strike; for effects that grant "unit
attacks twice," it means the first and second
strikes), and also, if unit does not trigger the
"attacks twice" effect and if decreasing the Spd
difference necessary to make a follow-up
attack by 10 would allow unit to trigger a
follow-up attack (excluding guaranteed
or prevented follow-ups), triggers
【Potent Follow 100%】during combat.

【Potent Follow 100%】
Triggers an additional follow-up attack
immediately after unit's standard follow-up
attack and deals damage = 100% of
unit's normal attack damage (if unit cannot
make a follow-up attack, this effect triggers
when the standard follow-up attack would
occur; this effect is treated like a follow-up
attack, so effects like "reduce damage by
X%" still apply, but this effect is not affected
by effects that prevent follow-ups or
"attacks twice" effects; only highest
value applied; does not stack).

$aReduces damage from foe's first attack by 5
during combat ("first attack" normally means
only the first strike; for effects that grant "unit
attacks twice," it means the first and second
strikes), and also, if unit does not trigger the
"attacks twice" effect and if decreasing the Spd
difference necessary to make a follow-up
attack by 10 would allow unit to trigger a
follow-up attack (excluding guaranteed
or prevented follow-ups), triggers
【Potent Follow 100%】during combat.
